title: There's a Volcano Underwater With Sharks Inside It
script: There's a volcano at the bottom of the ocean, and sharks are living inside it. It's called Kavachi, near the Solomon Islands, and it erupts so often the water above it turns acid-yellow and boils with ash. Scientists dropped a camera in expecting nothing could survive down there. Instead they found sharks, hammerheads and silky sharks, swimming right inside the crater of an active volcano. Nobody knows how they handle the heat and the acid, or what happens to them when it finally erupts. The mystery even earned a nickname: Sharkcano. Every time the volcano blows, that whole ecosystem vanishes under the plume. So how is anything alive down there at all?
